name: bhijan-neupane-research-portfolio
description: GitHub Pages-ready bilingual research portfolio for Bhijan Neupane.

scripts.check: node --check assets/app.js && node --check scripts/update-publications.mjs && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('data/publications.json')); JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('data/publication-overrides.json')); console.log('JSON and JavaScript checks passed.')"
